name: Salt Free Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons ALL PURPOSE SALT FREE BLEND
3/4 cup OLIVE OIL OR OTHER HIGH QUALITY VEGETABLE OIL.
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the all-purpose salt-free blend with vinegar.
2. Add oil to the salad and toss well.
3. Add the vinegar mixture to the salad and toss again.
4. Serve. Spice Hunter All Purpose Blend is an exquisitely balanced, all-purpose salt-free blend. Sprinkle on top of appetizers and entrees to intensify flavor and provide an attractive garnish. Use on eggs, casseroles, meats, seafood, fish, vegetables, sandwiches, and salads.
